review_text: Beautiful farm vibe. Quiet and very well maintained.  Owners are fantastic and make you feel so welcome 🙏. Facilities are lovely and clean xx Beautiful walks along the way.

Great little park, tucked away close to Denmark but 4 minutes out of town - close enough to duck in for groceries, a kebab, coffee & cake (all brilliant) but far enough out to enjoy peace and quiet in company with ducks, maggie's, kookas, a heron fishing in the creek and the odd feral bunny. Very dog friendly. Clean amenities and good, professional management by Jo and David. The place is a credit to them both and great value for money. Plenty of room for our 10m van and LWB truck and, hooked up and leaving to tick off the last 2 sights on our list - Elephant Rocks and Greens Pool - David's local knowledge proved invaluable in finding a couple of 20m long parking spots en route.

What a little piece of paradise. The park is well sheltered from the wind. The unpowered sites are huge. We arrive a little before the 2pm check in time, but the chores from the morning departures had been completed so we were allowed to check in 30m early (bonus). We were guided to the unpowered area, shown our nominated fire pit and told the park as we saw fit. The fire pits on either side were probably 25m away.
Great, relaxed, chill owner who is always up for a yarn. Nice walk along the river bank, and only a short distance from the town, which has the best IGA I have ever visited!
Booked for 3 nights, added an extra 2 as there is so much to do in the area, and it's a nice place to stay. Also the showers are sensational.

We have stayed here several times and we have loved our stay everytime.  Dave brought us fire wood and is just so friendly.  A lovely quiet park and you aren’t crammed in.  We took our kayaks and paddled into town and went to the bakery.
Most beautiful place to stay in Dennark. Close to town yet so quiet & peaceful, with great owners who give excellent service.

We've stayed here a few times in the last 15 years, and have always found it to peaceful. We most recently stay a few months ago and have never felt such a high level of hospitality at a caravan park.
This beautiful place isn't your regular CP, it is a home that you are invited into to join the wonderful location where a family also lives and works hard every day whilst making you feel welcomed.
Hopefully it won't be long before we're back!
Fantastic small family owned park. Thanks Dave and Jo for your awesome hospitality. We will be back
One of the most relaxing holidays we have had. Very friendly staff. Pet friendly. Just an all round nice place to stay.

Very rude and hostile from the get go
New management is shocking

Very rude and aggressive people. Just because you drive the wrong way? When no sign to show this ? If it’s private property and you don’t want people to take a look at your caravan park, (which I’ve previously stayed at) then put a gate.
Regards, (the guy who was in the Ute) well done

Arrived early hoping to be able to get in early as we have a very sick doggo only to be turned away and told to come back after 2pm quiet rudely actually.. we have never been turned away from an arrival in over 12 months on the road.. but we needed to have our puppy calm and still so we moved on and then emailed for at least a partial refund only again to be refused.. won't be back and will not recommend as compassion surely not a factor.. our opinion and situation..
When asked if we could pull up and wait before I could continue to mention our situation basically rudely told check in is 2pm as per your email and no exceptions was made clear.. no chance to even request compassion in my opinion.. we did notice plenty of room available.. thank you..

Genoten van de rust op de camping! Ik werd heel vriendelijk ontvangen door de eigenaren. Ik had een probleem met mijn camper. De eigenaresse heeft geholpen met het bellen van het verhuurbedrijf. Eigenaren zijn erg vriendelijk.
Mijn plek aan de rivier was groot en mooi! De bbq plek was top! BBQ-en met uitzicht op de rivier. Het sanitair was netjes en de camping keuken had alles wat ik nodig had! Ik ben een extra nacht gebleven, omdat het zo'n fijne plek was!

We stayed at this little gem for just over a week and absolutely loved it. It truly felt like we were tucked away in the bush. It was so peaceful and tranquil, with an abundance of wildlife around us. We appreciated the owner taking the time to stop and have a chat, sharing great tips about local spots to explore. It made the experience feel even more personal and welcoming. It was the perfect place to park up for a period of time and explore the miriad of places Denmark and surrounds Has to offer. If we ever come back to WA, this place is definitely one we will come back to.
What a lovely quiet corner of Denmark.  Beautiful grounds/wildlife. Location to town excellent with bike/walking trail, or 5 minute drive. Highly recommended.

Dave is an absolute legend. He was really helpful and I would always come back to his beautiful campground where they have a river that you can even fish in and eat a trout. If you catch it I would hardly recommend Denmark and to stay in this campsite, if you need a fantastic facility and host

Absolutely loved staying here with our caravan. A beautiful piece of land right by the river. Lots of space as they aren’t packing people in like most parks do. A stunning 20 minute walk along the river into town.
Easily the best caravan park in Denmark if you usually like bush camping - but with power and water. Well done!
Lovely quiet caravan park, great location. Set amongst shady trees along the river. Showers, toilets, laundry & communal kitchen.. Will be back.

We were able to book a spot very last minute by email for the next day, which worked smoothly and without any hassle – really appreciated that flexibility.

Unfortunately, it rained during our stay, and without a van the distance into Denmark town would feel quite far, so having your own vehicle definitely helps.

One small downside for us was the number of rules posted around the campsite. While we understand they are there for a reason, the many signs made the atmosphere feel a bit less relaxed than expected. It’s a pity that this likely comes from a few past cases where rules weren’t followed.

It's so beautiful here, the view, the green gras and all the special birds.
The house is cozy, neet and clean.
Very lovely place!

Cutest little chalet with everything you need inside and shopping close by! Kept very clean and in good condition. Beds nice and comfortable. And the view outside from the porch makes you want to stay here forever!
Hosts seem very sweet and helpful and they have fresh eggs when available.

Nice quiet campsite, super spacious as they don’t fill it up.
The camp kitchen is a little small, and the only dining area is by the barbecue, which is away from the kitchen area. But a pleasant stay overall.
One of the most beautiful caravan parks I’ve been to. So peaceful with good amenities & lovely staff. Thank you for the amazing memories 🥰

Riverbend Caravan Park Denmark is without a doubt the most beautiful little caravan park we’ve stayed at. Spacious sites, Serene, among trees, greenery and wildlife everywhere, you can not ask for better.
The facilities are clean and well maintained, continually being upgraded - love the dog park!
The owners, Dave and Jo, can not do enough to make you feel welcome and comfortable.
An absolute pleasure, thanks Dave and Jo.
Hidden Gem, spacious,  relaxing, serenity, Everything you and your pooch "if you had any with you" could ask for tbh in a relaxing get away.  😊
Super lovely and peaceful campsite! It was so lush and green with great facilities - best shower we’ve had !!
Great nature reserve and well maintained facilities. Ideal for people seeking a peaceful spot outside of town.
Very nice campsite, especially clean! Recommended stop!
Quiet caravan park that have spacious lots & good, clean facilities

We loved our stay and could have spent a week or more here. The place is peaceful and more “park “ than “caravan park”. Dave and Jo run the park brilliantly and welcome you personally during the 2-5pm check in time. So refreshing to have personal advice for visitors. There is a huge lawn, tall trees and abdandant birdlife. Jo was responsive to emails enabling us to secure a spot. They choose to take a relatively small number of guests each night to ensure plenty of space for those lucky enough to stay. They are regularly fully booked so best to email in advance to secure your spot in this relaxing and peaceful place. Dogs on lead are welcome and they are in the process of building a dog off lead area which will make a great addition. We highly recommend and will definitely be back.

This park has the feel of a farm stay tucked away beside the creek. We had a powered caravan site with enough room for our van and car plus awning. There had been a lot of rain before and during our stay so the sandy pad on our site was water logged. You are allowed to have a fire 🔥 right next to your van. Depending on your site it could be a bit of a walk to the amenities. They are kept clean and stocked. Please note you can only check-in after 2pm which means if you have a short travel time you will need to sit it out like we did.

In response to the owner reply: my score reflects how I rate your park against the 300 odd we have stayed at over  2.5 yrs of travelling. Yes this is my opinion. If you would like to raise your score then here are my suggestions. Let customers arrive a little earlier (we waited in town for 3 hrs due to your entrance time.) Spend some money improving the roads, sites and amenities. The weather only highlights what is within your control to improve.

A little gem of a caravan park. Small but very spacious and the most beautiful setting. Very clean and well maintained- lovely friendly owners. Our first stay but won’t be our last - we can’t wait to return.
Great little park. Staff very helpful and nice people.
Loved it, close to town, peaceful, huge sites and it's not your usual van park as it's intimate with only 20 sites, highly recommend

We had a fantastic 8 night stay in an amazing powered site, close to the toilet/ bathroom.    What an absolute gem of a place.  The hosts/ owners are really lovely people and  go the extra mile to make you feel at home.    They supply campfires and wood  if required which is great for the cool nights.  All amenities are really clean,  so many little touches they have added to the place make it just next level.    Would thoroughly recommend to anybody looking for a lovely chill and welcoming place to stay, close to Denmark Town and beaches etc.  You are not crammed in on top of each other,  the sites are really well spaced.

Was lovely to sit and relax and listen and watch the birds and ducks with their cute babies in such a peaceful natural setting.   You can walk around the local river which borders the park and hearing the river running when you wake up in the morning is lovely.    We can't wait to go back.

Very nice Campground. Lovely garden area next to the river. The hosts live on site and are very friendly and provide firewood.
Facilities are decent. It was clean, even though more 4 than 5 stars on that.
We would always come back when staying in Denmark

Absolutely fantastic campsite just minutes from town, yet peaceful and serene. Set right beside the river, the location is tranquil and surrounded by nature. The sites are generously sized and well spaced for privacy. The amenities are spotless and exceptionally well maintained. The owners are friendly, helpful, and a pleasure to deal with. We loved the abundance of wildlife and the relaxing atmosphere—highly recommend!

Beautiful family-run accomodation, green and quiet and close to town. We especially loved the cozy wood fire in our chalet. (Our daughter loved the swings and the chickens, too!) Jo and Dave went out of their way to make our stay exceptional. Cannot recommend highly enough!

Our spot was ok because it's was a bit of bad weather and we had a dog we got a spot under a beautiful tree but black dirt made it a bit dirty in our van and a bit chilly. Toilets were fine hot water pretty little park.

Second time here with our dog, great little park
Friendly Owners
Clean facilities
Very quiet
Great value
and an added bonus ...discovered the Kwoorabup Walk Trail into town , great walk along the Denmark River into town.

Powered site good size
Out of the way
2.5k walk into town by road or along the river.
The bays are flat and level (bay 2) and quite roomy.
We stayed here in an unpowered site for 3 nights. Good location however not sufficient showers or toilets for the volume of guests. All are in various places around the main area.

This was our second time at this park and loved it just the same time as the first. Nice upgrades too to camp kitchen and BBQ areas. Particularly love the nice open  spaces, big family bathrooms with hot showers and the friendly owners and atmosphere. It's the perfect park for those that want true camping feels the big 4 fuss. Thanks again, well back in another few!
Great park, peaceful
Great little park. Very clean. The showers are amazing!!! It was a good find not too crowded and well maintained.

Stayed here for 2 nights and thoroughly enjoyed our stay.  A small quiet park with plenty of space between vans.  Clean and well kept.  Just around the corner from Denmark townsite. The hosts were very friendly and helpful.  Thanks for everything you did for us.
Sensational park with fantastic owners

I wouldn't recommend this location for it's chalets, they are very outdated and in need of some serious work.
No air-conditioning or fans provided (we had to purchase from Mitre10). The bathroom doors won't stay shut, the bathroom is so tiny you're better off using the communal shower to avoid being stuck to the curtain (which was mouldy), the lighting yellow and dull, power points hard to reach without moving furniture, ants and millipedes getting in everywhere.
We had to do a couple of unexpected loads of washing ($4 for washing and $4 for drying) but there was no washing powder to use/purchase so be sure to take your own even if not planning on washing.

The grounds are very well kept and tidy, probably great for caravan or camping, otherwise I'd probably look elsewhere.

Would not recommend staying in a chalet. Would be wonderful if you had your own caravan but the rooms are really out dated amenities, lights, dirty and dusty, no AC or fans had to get our own. The bathroom is tiny in the room with no bench space and god forbid you look too closely in the shower.
Great site for exploring the area, nice friendly ducks,( and owners ) good camping kitchen setup

Absolutely beautiful location, great ammenities and kind, welcoming staff who provided great advice on where to go and what to see in our limited stay.
Only a short drive from the stunning beaches and multiple top wineries just up the road.
We couldn’t have asked for much more. We will definitely be visiting again.

Could not value this camping location highly enough!
Went here with my husband and 2 large dogs camping in our tent. Talk about serenity!
Very welcoming, tranquil, relaxing location.
It is situated on calming grounds with a chicken coupe, large trees to hear the wind gust through, hot - high pressure showers in private amenity rooms (which is what you’d expect from a hotel rather than camping dwellings) and flushable toilets.
Will definitely be visiting again, maybe make a trip a coupe of times a year 🤍
Absolutely LOVED our visit!

We’ve just returned from a 5 night stay at this little gem. What a beautiful place. We stayed on a powered site with our dog and it was perfect. Hot showers, clean and tidy laundry, fantastic kitchen and stunning views. This is such a well cared for place. The ablutions are individual so no sharing a shower/toilet block. Some were single toilets, some were shower/toilet rooms and all have been kept in tip top condition. Sites are spacious too and you don’t feel on top of each other. We had picture perfect views from our site and enjoyed watching all the wildlife with our morning coffee.
It’s a quiet place which is what we were looking for and couldn’t fault it.
This is definitely our go to place when travelling down south.

This has to be one of the most enjoyable stays we have had in a long time at a cp.
Very quiet, spread out so not on top of each other. Close to town, scenic bush surroundings, family friendly and pet friendly. We stayed on a powered site with Caravan.

Another delightful stay at Riverbend. Highly recommend this tranquil park surrounded by huge Karri trees and bushland. The meticulous owners Dave and Jo are continually upgrading facilities and spacing caravan bays to ensure a comfortable private stay. Best value CP in WA. Magda and Dick Ausin

The most beautiful family owned caravan park. Spacious open sites ideal for families and friend group get togethers. The amenities are clean and very well maintained. Obviously well loved by the owners, small value adding touches throughout the park.|Full of greenery and surrounded but natural bush and wildlife, absolutely stunning!|Beautiful walk along the river into town.|Highly recommended, this is now our go to caravan park in Denmark.|Thank you Jo and David x

A beautiful well maintained location set by the river. Nature abounds. Peaceful, clean, green lawns, no unnecessary lighting to block the stars. Big spaces. No crowding. I’d recommend this for a relaxing stay. However I gave 3 stars instead of 5. The hosts obviously work extremely hard. By themselves I’d say. They are tired and worn down. It shows. Unfortunately. A gentle more respectful approach to any issues they have with guests would be beneficial.

We’ve had the pleasure of staying at this exceptional privately owned caravan park where the hosts were incredibly welcoming & the camping spot was breathtaking beautiful, in fact it ranks among the top campgrounds we’ve encountered during our travels across Australia. $39 pn for power & water
Great little caravan park. Excellent location out of the wind. The owner/operators were great. Very helpful and friendly.
Great spot to camp. Plenty of space on green grass. Well maintained and friendly service

Stayed for 3 nights at this fabulous park and are so happy we found this gem.  Awesome hosts, super clean & quiet, fabulous outlook and friendly bird life.
A pleasure to stay and will definitely be back. Highly recommend!

Such a quiet place surrounded by ducks and birds. Love being woken by Kookaburras that break the early morning silence.|Toilets and bathrooms clean and tidy, dump point and recycling available as well.|Also loved the sound of the running river.

Our stay here was amazing. Dave and Jo were so welcoming and went out of their way to make sure our stay was great. The facilities were also brilliant, would highly recommend staying here and we will be back if we are in Denmark again. Thanks again!

Easily one of THE best privately-run properties in WA. Immaculate grounds, ensuite-style bathrooms, ample spaces to camp or unhitch the van, and the bird life is spectacular. Great hosts who have created a jewell in the caravan and camping world

Location is incredibly beautiful. Plenty of wildlife around and chickens to feed. Plenty of room, and swings for the kids to run around and play with. The owners really care about the place and are very attentive. Will definitely be back

Beautiful campground with lush green grass, well maintained overlooking the river. New ablution block being built which will a great update, although current showers have good pressure and are clean and tidy. Love the ducklings and birds.
Recommend a stay here.

What a hidden gem. I almost didn't write a review because I want to keep it to myself 😁 however, Dave & Jo who own & run the park deserve to have people know how well kept the park is, how very welcoming & friendly Dave & Jo are. Highly recommended for a peaceful break away.

This would have to be the best caravan park we have stayed in to date on our travels with our camper trailer. We arrived in early June and  had three sunny blue sky days, with only a few campers in attendance.

The location beside the river with the trees and birdlife is gorgeous and combined with being only a short cycle ride or walk from town made this a really relaxing stay for us.

Very near little town of Denmark along the river. Showers/toilets were very clean however cleaning staff were there at awkward times and had little patience for you to finish up.
Despite being pretty empty, all campers were packed into the same row.. seemed odd considering there was so much space.

Booked for four weeks stayed six! Love it here, love Denmark!
Dave and Joe are accommodating, park is great, wouldn’t stay anywhere else
Nice little park close to Denmark.
Nice spot - good location to explore Denmark. Amazing facilities!!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Riverbend Caravan Park, and I must say it was an exceptional experience. From the moment we arrived, we were impressed by the attention to detail and the warm hospitality.

Here are some highlights of our stay:

Privacy: Our pitch was incredibly private. We felt like we had our own little oasis, away from the hustle and bustle.
Scenic Walk: The walk into town along the river was nothing short of amazing. It allowed us to explore the surroundings and enjoy the natural beauty.
Relaxation: We both had a relaxing time, and the tranquil atmosphere was exactly what we needed.
The only downside was missing the firepit ban lift, but honestly, it just gives us another reason to come back! We’re already looking forward to our next visit.

Thank you to the entire team for making our stay memorable. We highly recommend it to anyone seeking a peaceful and rejuvenating getaway. 🌟
Stayed for 3 nights on a powered tent site . personally I think this is a hidden gem .clean amenities . Very close to all the good things Denmark and the surrounding area have to offer

We have been staying at Riverbend for many years now. It is an awesome family and pet friendly caravan park nestled into a forest type environment by a small river.👌 Joe and Dave have created such a welcoming atmosphere here making it a must do experience for both the young and mature aged camper. 🤗 Vicki and I are looking forward to many more years at Riverbend 😍

We are loving our stay at this gorgeous caravan park. The owners are super friendly and helpful. The facilities are clean. Kids are having a great time riding their bikes around, visiting the chickens, playing basketball and using the awesome tree swings.
We are also loving all the birdlife, and the stars are magnificent at night.

We had a beautiful time here with my family over Easter. Cottages are cosy and beds are comfy! Surrounded by towering Karri trees and fringed by the Denmark river, it’s a great spot for twitchers. We spotted, blue wrens, scarlet robins, yellow rumped thornbills, silver eyes, Western Rosellas, 28s aka Western Ringnecks, grey fantails, a Gilbert’s honeyeater and red-eared firetails all while sitting on the front porch. An absolute delight!

We've stayed here a few times (for work and for holidays) and every time we have had such a friendly welcome from Jo and Dave (and Rio the dog!). The campsite is green, scenic and quiet, a lovely place to stay. Showers etc very well maintained. We'll be back for sure!

If you don't like hearing the birds,the kookaburras laughing beautiful bush and river walks and an easy walk to town then this place isn't for you. So peaceful and quiet apart from the birds.. Beautifully maintained and a very warm welcome on arrival. Our first time here but will definitely be back.

If you want a relaxing and stress-free holiday don’t come here. We experienced the owner who thinks hidden policy supersedes common courtesy. So aggressive, jumped a fence to seem to want to have physical altercation for just being tolerant….Must be Christmas. I think it is under new management, stayed here 4 years and it was okay. Rather go to a more established park. EV hybrids vehicles not welcome.
Always stay there. Very comfortable and pleasant. Friedly family run and quiet

Beautiful picturesque caravan park with lots to do.We stayed in Blue Wren Cabin and it was so homely with absaloutly everything you need.Comfortable beds and pillows ,clean and very quiet. The bird life is amazing and the river and little waterfall at the bottom of the park is just so relaxing. Town is 3min drive so you are close to everything 10/10 from us ,thank you  to Jo and Dave

Great little caravan park. Clean amenities.  Caravan spots are a little close for comfort,  we had someone come in after us and park literally 5 metres away up the embankment directly behind us. Their dog woke us at 5am every morning and we could hear every word they spoke,  so if you like space and quiet probably not for you.
We arrived late and tried to call to book for tenting but faced with a very rude answer. Dave does not know how to talk with people as a customer service person. Very rude!!

We really enjoyed our stay on a powered tent site in November. Especially enjoyed the greenery, river, trees and birdlife. Having the use of the BBQ and gazebo was especially convenient for us as campers. Thank you Dave and Jo for your efforts in making all your guests feel at home. The absence of a full camp kitchen and fridge was a little inconvenient, but definitely not a show stopper.
Small family run Caravan Park. Owners are very friendly & keep the park well presented. We visit regularly & enjoy our stay each time.

Lovely, quiet park located within a very short  drive from the Denmark township. Pet friendly, clean amenities, plenty of  space, with  both powered and non powered sites. We love the  bush camp feel, surrounded by nature, beautiful scenery, quality firewood  you can order onsite, delivered to your location each night... whats not to love! ....Dave & Jo have created a beautiful haven for all to enjoy! a must stay when visiting Delightful  Denmark!
If you like waking up to the sound of birds instead of kids, this is the park for you

Picture perfect piece of paradise. wonderful people wonderful place to stay. Camp fire during the cooler nights just added to the magic of the magpies, 28s, kookaburras, wrens, duck's.....gorgeous river walk and a 40 minute walk into town admiring beautiful gardens and homes all the way.
Very large bays, dog friendly, beautiful setting. Quiet. Fantastic hosts.

Assorted accommodation.
Quiet place by the river.
Only 2k from Denmark.
Family owned, family friendly.

Great peaceful well presented camp loved the grass sites, made a change from the usual Australian dust bowl camps.
Reasonable rate. Highly recommend.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Riverbend. It was so relaxing and such a tranquil setting. Plenty of space on the unpowered site. The facilities were beautiful and clean. Jo and Dave were lively to deal with, highly recommended. 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟

Beautiful location
Basic amenities but clean and well kept
Lovely peaceful location and great clean chalet. Wood fire and room for our dogs, definitely stay again. Thanks Dave an Jo

We love camping at Riverbend chalets and caravan park, it's just so beautiful  lush with a flowing river, spotless amenities, an amazing  drying room for your washing in wet weather,or they have dryers as well, it's close to town great for a walk or a bike ride into town. Thanks to Jo and David for letting us come and enjoy there  little piece of paradise
